proposal_summary: This proposal enables five chain-specific reverse resolvers for L2 EVM networks (Arbitrum, Base, Linea, OP Mainnet and Scroll), one default reverse resolver as a fallback, and a new .eth registrar controller. It also sets the reverse records of some currently un-named ENS contracts.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal requires 16 separate transactions configuring namespaces across several L2s and managing roles/records for various ENS contracts. While not highly complex structurally, it touches a significant number of components.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: This proposal contains 16 transaction(s) to be executed by the ENS DAO Timelock.
